title: aster lowieanus
intro: Aster lowlieanus, also known as Aster lowlieanus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Aster lowlieanus include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Aster lowlieanus can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea or by drying and crushing the plant to make a powder for use in tinctures or salves.
